## Meta Announces C$13 Billion AI Data Centre Investment in Canada

Another large hyperscaler data centre commitment at this scale sustains the AI infrastructure demand cycle that underpins the capex-sensitive supply chain; the Canadian venue may also signal cross-border considerations — energy availability, regulatory environment — worth tracking for power and data centre names.

- Meta is committing C$13 billion to a new AI data centre in Canada, per the headline figure.
- The announcement represents a major hyperscaler capex commitment extending the AI infrastructure build cycle.
- No operational timeline, site specifics, or capacity details are provided in the headline.
- Meta stock is flagged as 'in focus' following the announcement, suggesting near-term market attention.
